title: Manufacturing Engineer - TVS Motor - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - TVS Motor - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
